data.title: Plugin version in plugin.json reset to 1.0.0 — version bumps skipped since 0.33.0
data.description: Commit fb58b9d8 (2026-03-30, fix(571a-3c6f): replace relative path derivation with git rev-parse in plugin scripts) accidentally overwrote the version field in plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json from 0.33.0 to 1.0.0. Since that commit, multiple epics have been merged to main without version bumps occurring — bump-version.sh reads version.file_path from dso-config.conf (which points to plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json), so all subsequent bumps would have incremented from 1.0.0 if they ran at all. Expected: version should be ~0.36.0+ reflecting the epics merged since 0.33.0. Fix: restore the version to the correct value and verify bump-version.sh is being invoked during merge-to-main.sh.
